verses.text: Tu-in Ahab' suanlekhak mihing sawmsagih Samaria-ah teng uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jehu in laikhakte gelh a, khuapi ukte, upate, leh Ahab' suanlekhak a kemte tung Samaria-ah tua laite khakin
“Tu-in hih lai na ngah phetun, na topa uh suante note tawh omin, leengte leh sakolte, kulh a nei khuapite zong, leh hiamte na neihna uh thei un
Na topa uh suante sung pan a hoihpen leh a kilawm pen teelin a pa' kumpi tokhom tungah tusak un la, na topa uh innkuan-a' dingin do un,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin amaute nakpi takin lau uh a, “En un, kumpi nihte in amah nang zolo uh ahih ciangin eite in bangci nan'zawh ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin kumpi inn a ukte leh khuapi a ukte in upate leh a kemte tawh kigawmin Jehu kiangah mi sawl uh a, “Kote nangma nasemte ka hi uh a, nong sawl khempeuh ka hih ding uh hi. Khat zong kumpi-in ka bawl kei ding uh hi; hoih na sak bangbangin hong hih in,” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin Jehu in amaute kiangah laikhak nihna gelhin, “Note kei lamah omin, keima thu a mang dingin a kiging na hih uh leh, na topa uh Ahab' suanlekhakte' lutangte hong la un la, zing ciang tubang hunin kei kiang Jezreel-ah hong puak un,” a ci hi. Tu-in kumpipa' suanlekhak mihing sawmsagihte pen amaute a khoi khuapi makaite tawh omkhawm uh hi
Amaute kiangah a laikhak a tun' ciangin amaute in kumpipa' suanlekhak tua mihing sawmsagihte that uh a, a lutangte seeng sungah guangin Jehu kiang Jezreel-ah a puak uh hi
Kamtaipa hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Amaute in kumpipa' suanlekhakte' lutangte hong paipih uh hi,” ci-in a gen ciangin amah in, “Zingsang mateng kulhkongpi lutna-ah khawl nihin koih un,” a ci hi
Zingsangin amah a paikhiat ciangin tua mite khempeuh kiangah, “Note na paubaang kei uh hi. Kumpi Joram sawmsimin a thatpa keimah ka hi hi. Ahih hangin hihte khempeuh a sattuk kua ahi hiam
Ahab' innkuan tawh kizomin Topa in a gen thu, Topa' kammal khat zong lei-ah kialo ding hi, ci-in thei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a nasempa Elijah kiangah a gensa thu Topa in sem khinzo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jehu in kuamah a sit nawnloh dongin Jezreel khua sungah Ahab' innkuan a omlaite, a behte, leh a lawm meltheihte, leh a siampite khempeuh a that hi
Tua ciangin amah dingkhia-in Samaria-ah a pai hi. Lamkal, Tuucingte' Buk a tun' laitakin

Jehu in Judah kumpi Ahaziah' behte tuak a, amah in, “Kuate na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in dawngin, “Ahaziah' behte ka hi uh a, Jezreel khua-a om kumpinu' tapate leh kumpi ta dangte kiangah a hawh dingin hong paisuk ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi

Amah in a mite kiangah, “Hingmat un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in tua mite hingmat uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute thatin tua lai-a om dum sungah amaute mi sawmlilenih a sisa-in lawnsuk uh a, amah in amaute khat zong hingkhawilo hi

Tua lai panin amah a kihepkhiat ciangin amah a dawn dingin a hong pai Rekhab' tapa Jehonadab tawh kituak hi. Jehu in tuapa hopihin ama kiangah, “Keima lungsim nang tungah a thuman bangin nang' lungsim kei' tungah a thuman hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jehonadab in dawngin, “Man hi,” a ci hi. Jehu in, “A man leh na khut hong khak in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a khut a khak hi. Tua ciangin Jehu in leeng sungah amah kaito hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Kei hong zui in la, Topa-a' ding ka deihluatna hong thei in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jehu in a leeng sungah amah tuangsak hi
Samaria-ah a tun' ciangin Topa in Elijah' tungah a gen bangin Jehu in amaute a siakkhiat dongin Samaria sunga Ahab mi a omlaite khempeuh a that khin hi.
Tua ciangin Jehu in mi khempeuh khawmin amaute kiangah, “Ahab in Baal na tawmkhat sem a, ahi zongin Jehu in tampi semzaw ding hi

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Baal kamsangte khempeuh, leh a siampite khempeuh kei kiangah hong sam un. Baal tungah biakpiakna lianpi nei ding ka hih manin kuamah pelemsak kei un. A pelem peuhmah nungtalo ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin Baal a biate a suksiat theihna dingin Jehu in ngian tawh a hih ahi hi
Tua ciangin Jehu in thu pia-in, “Baal-a' dingin a thupi kikhopna khat bawl un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in tua thu zasak uh hi

Tua ciangin Jehu in Israel sung khempeuhah thu zasak hi. Baal a bia khempeuh hong pai uh a, hong pailo mi khat zong omlo hi. Tua ciangin Baal biakinn sungah amaute lut uh a, Baal biakinn mong khat pan mong khat dong a dim uh hi
Amah in puan koihna a ukpa kiangah, “Baal a biate khempeuh-a' dingin puante hong la in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in amaute-a' dingin a puante hong paikhiatpih hi

Tua ciangin Rekhab' tapa Jehonadab tawh Baal biakinn sungah Jehu a tum hi. Tua ciangin amah in Baal a biate kiangah, “Hih lai-ah Baal a biate bek omin note' lakah Topa' nasemte a omlohna ding thei un la, zong un,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin biakpiaknate leh meihal biaknate a pia dingin amah a tum hi. Tu-in Jehu in a pualamah mi sawmgiat koih a, “Na khutsung uhah kongpiakte khat peuhpeuh a khahsuahpa in ama nuntakna tawh loh ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin meihal biakna a bawl a man khit phetin Jehu in a cingte leh uliante kiangah, “Sungtum un la, amaute that un; mi khat zong suaktasak kei un,” a ci hi. Amaute in namsau tawh a thah khit uh ciangin a cingte leh uliante in amaute lawnkhia uh a, tua ciangin Baal biakinn sungnung dei-ah tumin
Baal biakinn sunga om biakna song paikhiatpihin a hal uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in Baal biakna song susia-in, Baal biakinn susia uh a, tuni dongin ekbuk a suaksak uh hi
Tua bangin Jehu in Israel sung panin Baal siakkhia hi
Ahih hangin Bethel leh Dan-ah a om kham bawngnote ahi, Israel-te a khialhsakna, Nebat' tapa Jeroboam' khialhnate panin Jehu kiheikhia lo hi

Tua ciangin Topa in Jehu kiangah, “Nangmah in keima muhna-ah a man thu limtakin na sepna hang, leh ka lungsimah a om bangin Ahab' innkuan tungah na bawlna hangin, na suante khang lina dongin Israel kumpi tokhom tungah tu ding hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Jehu in a lungsim khempeuh tawh Israel Pasian, Topa' thukham limtakin zuih ding ngaihsunlo hi. Israel-te a khialhsakna ahi Jeroboam' khialhnate panin amah kiheilo hi
Tua hun lai-in Topa in Israel gam pawlkhat khenkhiat ding kipan hi. Hazael in Israel gamsung khempeuhah amaute zo hi
Jordan panin nisuahna lam, Gilead gam khempeuh, Gad mite, Reuben mite, leh Manasseh mite, Arnon kuam gei-a om Aroer panin Gilead leh Bashan gam khempeuh a zogawp hi
Tu-in Jehu' gamtatna a omlaite, a sep khempeuh, leh ama thahatnate khempeuh, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Jehu si a, amaute in Samaria-ah amah a vui uh hi. Tua ciangin ama tapa Jehoahaz in ama tangin a uk hi
Jehu in Samaria panin Israel tungah kum sawmnihlegiat sung a uk hi.
